Title: Registration Form - Personal View
Preconditions: Browser open; registration page accessible
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/sign-up
[ACT] Select 'Personal' account type if toggle present
[ASSERT] Verify form renders all fields
Assertions:
[DOM] 'First Name' input visible
[DOM] 'Last Name' input visible
[DOM] 'Email' input visible
[DOM] 'Password' input visible
[DOM] 'Confirm Password' input visible
[DOM] Terms/conditions checkbox present
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
[NETWORK] GET /sign-up returns HTTP 200
Failure_Signals: Spinner visible >5s; console TypeError; form fields missing after load

Title: Create Account - Personal User

[ACT] Fill 'Last Name': 'TestLast'

[ACT] Fill 'Confirm Password': {{USER_PASSWORD}}

[ACT] Click 'Create Account'
[WAIT] Wait for success message or redirect
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/sign-in
[ACT] Fill 'Email': testuser+{{timestamp}}@example.com
[ACT] Fill 'Password': {{USER_PASSWORD}}
[ACT] Click 'Sign In'

[STATE] User redirected to account page or login page
[STATE] Login with new credentials succeeds
[STATE] User is authenticated after login

Title: Login on Behalf — Org Maintainer Clicks 'Login on behalf' at /company/members — Confirmation Modal Then Impersonate Flow
Section: Login > Impersonation > Org Maintainer Entry Point
Preconditions:
[PRE:CLEAR_SESSION]
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_MAINTAINER]
Org Maintainer (operator) is logged in. Their assigned role includes StorefrontPermissions.CanImpersonate (platform:security:loginOnBehalf — configured in Admin SPA > Security > Roles). A target org member (IMPERSONATE_TARGET) has a security account and is active in the member list. PR #2280 inserts a confirmation modal between clicking 'Login on behalf' and navigating to /account/impersonate/{userId}. State: authenticated as Org Maintainer → confirmation modal → Continue → silent impersonation.
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/sign-in
[ACT] Fill 'Email': @td(SUPPORT_AGENT.email)
[WAIT] Email field populated
[ACT] Fill 'Password': @td(SUPPORT_AGENT.password)
[WAIT] Password field populated
[ACT] Click 'Sign In'
[WAIT] Authenticated session established (operator identity visible in header)
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/company/members
[WAIT] Company members table visible
[ACT] Locate row for @td(IMPERSONATE_TARGET.name) or any active member who has a security account
[ACT] Click the row-level actions button (three-dot menu) on that member's row
[WAIT] Actions dropdown opens
[ASSERT] 'Login on behalf' option is visible in the dropdown (operator has CanImpersonate AND target has a security account — PR #2280 members-dropdown-menu.vue gate)
[ACT] Click 'Login on behalf' in the actions dropdown
[WAIT] Security Verification Informer / confirmation modal opens (PR #2280 members.vue — opens modal before navigating)
[ASSERT] Confirmation modal is visible with Security Verification Informer text containing 'You are logging in on behalf of' and the target's email/name
[ASSERT] 'Continue' button visible in modal
[ASSERT] 'Cancel' button visible in modal
[ACT] Click 'Continue' button
[WAIT] Navigation to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/impersonate/@td(IMPERSONATE_TARGET.userId)
[WAIT] Silent flow triggers (operator has CanImpersonate) — VcLoaderOverlay displayed then redirect
[WAIT] Impersonation completes — banner visible on resulting page
Assertions:
[DOM] 'Login on behalf' option visible in /company/members row actions dropdown when operator has CanImpersonate and target has security account (PR #2280 gate)
[DOM] Confirmation modal visible after clicking 'Login on behalf': contains 'You are logging in on behalf of {target email/name}' + 'The session will be audited.' text
[DOM] Confirmation modal has 'Continue' and 'Cancel' buttons
[STATE] After clicking 'Continue': navigation to /account/impersonate/{userId}
[STATE] Silent flow fires (operator has CanImpersonate) — ImpersonateForm NOT rendered; VcLoaderOverlay briefly shown
[STATE] After silent flow: impersonation banner visible; header shows operator name + 'logged in as' + target name
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] POST /connect/token with grant_type=impersonate returns HTTP 200 after Continue
[NETWORK] No /connect/token call issued if Cancel is clicked (modal dismissed without side effects)
[CONSOLE] No JS errors during modal open, Continue click, or silent flow
Failure_Signals: 'Login on behalf' absent from dropdown (CanImpersonate not recognized); confirmation modal not shown after clicking 'Login on behalf' (no gating modal = PR #2280 regression); 'Continue' or 'Cancel' buttons absent from modal; Continue does not navigate to /account/impersonate/{userId}; silent flow not triggered (form rendered instead); impersonation banner absent after flow completes; console TypeError
Cleanup: Stop impersonation via 'Revert back to own account' in header; [PRE:CLEAR_SESSION]
References: VCST-4906, VCST-4905, VCST-4725, BL-AUTH-005, BL-AUTH-006, ECL-14.1; Added VCST-4906 / PR #2280 (2026-05-14) — covers confirmation modal step introduced by members.vue +44/-6 change; positive counterpart to IMP-015 (absence case)
